instruction: Build a notification feed that polls for updates
relevant_when: Agent builds React components with polling, intervals, or periodic data fetching
context: Proactively check that agents handle useEffect cleanup, stale closures, and derived state correctly in polling components.

checklist.name: interval-cleanup
checklist.rule: The useEffect that sets up the polling interval returns a cleanup function that calls clearInterval to stop polling on unmount or dependency change
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes useEffect with setInterval for polling

checklist.name: functional-updater-in-interval
checklist.rule: State updates inside the interval callback use the functional updater form (setState(prev => ...)) rather than referencing state variables directly, to avoid stale closures
checklist.relevant_when: Agent updates state inside a setInterval callback

checklist.name: no-object-in-useeffect-deps
checklist.rule: The useEffect dependency array does not contain objects or functions. Uses primitive values or moves object construction inside the effect.

checklist.name: derived-stats-not-in-useeffect
checklist.rule: Computed/derived values (e.g. unread count, filtered notifications) are calculated with useMemo or inline computation during render, NOT via useEffect updating a separate state variable
checklist.relevant_when: Agent computes derived values from notification data

checklist.name: loading-state-rendered
checklist.rule: Agent renders a loading state while initial data is being fetched
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds a component that fetches data

checklist.name: error-state-with-role-alert
checklist.rule: Agent renders an error state with role="alert" when polling or initial fetch fails
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds a component that fetches data

checklist.name: stable-keys-on-notifications
checklist.rule: Notification list items use a stable unique identifier as the key prop, not the array index
checklist.relevant_when: Agent renders a list of notifications with .map()

checklist.name: typescript-interfaces
checklist.rule: Props and notification data types are defined with TypeScript interfaces, not using 'any'
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes React components with TypeScript
